ensures.text: CountIth(i, s) == CountChar(('A' as int + i) as char, s)
CountIth(i, s) == CountChar(('A' as int + i) as char, s)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger CountIth(i, s)} | 0 <= i < k :: CountIth(i, s) >= m
forall i: int {:trigger CountIth(i, s)} | 0 <= i < k :: CountIth(i, s) >= m

foralls.ensures: CountChar(('A' as int + i) as char, s) >= m

assertions.text: CountChar(('A' as int + wit) as char, s) < m

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger upper[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: upper[j] == ('A' as int + j) as char
forall j: int {:trigger upper[j]} {:trigger counts[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: counts[j] == CountChar(upper[j], s)
forall j: int {:trigger upper[j]} {:trigger counts[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: counts[j] == CountChar(upper[j], s)
forall j: int {:trigger counts[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: minCount <= counts[j]

assertions.text: upper[ii] == ('A' as int + ii) as char
upper[minIdx] == ('A' as int + minIdx) as char

ensures.text: forall m: int {:trigger HasAtLeastMOfEach(s, k, m)} | length / k < m && m <= |s| :: !HasAtLeastMOfEach(s, k, m)
forall m: int {:trigger HasAtLeastMOfEach(s, k, m)} | length / k < m && m <= |s| :: !HasAtLeastMOfEach(s, k, m)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < |s| :: 'A' <= s[i] && s[i] <= ('A' as int + k - 1) as char
forall i: int {:trigger s[i]} | 0 <= i < |s| :: 'A' <= s[i] && s[i] <= ('A' as int + k - 1) as char
